title: Wedding Crasher
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When Geronimo crashes his stingy uncle's wedding, he finds hidden gold, a plain bride in need of a makeover, and a cousin who is up to no good! 💍

q.en: Who sent Geronimo the wedding invitation?
q.zh: 是谁给杰罗尼摩寄来了婚礼请柬？

explain.en: The invitation was from Uncle Samuel S. Stingysnout, inviting Geronimo to his son Stevie's wedding.
explain.zh: 请柬是塞缪尔·吝啬鼻叔叔寄来的，邀请杰罗尼摩参加儿子史蒂维的婚礼。

q.en: What was the name of Uncle Samuel's castle?
q.zh: 塞缪尔叔叔的城堡叫什么名字？

explain.en: The ceremony was held at Penny Pincher Castle, which sat on a hill called Cheap Change Hill.
explain.zh: 婚礼在小气鬼城堡举行，那座城堡坐落在一座叫作廉价零钱丘的山上。

q.en: What did Benjamin make as his wedding gift?
q.zh: 本杰明亲手做了什么当作结婚礼物？

explain.en: Benjamin showed Geronimo two small red cardboard hearts with the names of the bride and groom on them.
explain.zh: 本杰明给杰罗尼摩看两颗红色的小纸板心，上面写着新娘和新郎的名字。

q.en: What trick did Cousin Trap play that made Geronimo itch?
q.zh: 表哥特拉普用了什么恶作剧让杰罗尼摩浑身发痒？

explain.en: Trap sprinkled itching powder on Geronimo, making him scratch so badly he took off his pants in public.
explain.zh: 特拉普在杰罗尼摩身上撒了痒痒粉，害得他拼命抓痒，还在大庭广众下脱掉了裤子。

q.zh: 那位相貌平平的新娘是谁？

explain.en: Patience Plainpaws was the shy, plain bride-to-be with thick glasses, plain brown fur, and a gray dress.
explain.zh: 帕兴斯·平淡爪是那位害羞又普通的新娘，戴着厚眼镜，长着朴素的棕色毛，穿着灰色连衣裙。

q.en: What did Stevie Stingysnout want Geronimo to publish?
q.zh: 史蒂维·吝啬鼻想让杰罗尼摩出版什么？

options.en: His book 'Memoirs of a Perfect Rodent'
options.zh: 他写的《完美老鼠回忆录》
一本关于奶酪香水的书

explain.en: Stevie asked Geronimo to publish his book called Memoirs of a Perfect Rodent, which was all about himself.
explain.zh: 史蒂维请杰罗尼摩出版他写的《完美老鼠回忆录》，那本书全是在讲他自己。

q.en: What tiny meal did Uncle Samuel serve for the light dinner?
q.zh: 吝啬鼻叔叔那顿简便晚餐端出了怎样少得可怜的食物？

options.en: One stuffed pea, one brussels sprout, and one raspberry
options.zh: 一颗填馅豌豆、一颗煮抱子甘蓝和一颗覆盆子

options.en: A big bowl of mussel soup

explain.en: Uncle Samuel served just one stuffed pea, then one boiled brussels sprout, and one raspberry for dessert.
explain.zh: 吝啬鼻叔叔只上了一颗填馅豌豆，接着是一颗煮抱子甘蓝，甜点则是一颗覆盆子。

q.en: What did Geronimo discover Uncle Samuel doing in the tower at night?
q.zh: 夜里杰罗尼摩发现塞缪尔叔叔在塔楼里做什么？

options.en: Counting a huge pile of gold coins

explain.en: Through the keyhole, Geronimo saw Uncle Samuel surrounded by gold coins, counting them one by one — he was rich all along.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩透过锁孔看见塞缪尔叔叔被金币包围，正一枚枚地数着——原来他一直很有钱。

q.en: What did Patience's father invent that made the family rich?
q.zh: 帕兴斯的父亲发明了什么，让全家变得富有？

options.en: A cheese-scented perfume called Scent of Swiss
options.zh: 一种叫瑞士之香的奶酪味香水

explain.en: Patience's father created a cheese-scented perfume called Scent of Swiss, which became a huge hit and made the family rich.
explain.zh: 帕兴斯的父亲发明了一种叫瑞士之香的奶酪味香水，大受欢迎，让全家发了财。

q.en: What did Thea do to help Patience feel better?
q.zh: 蒂娜为了帮帕兴斯振作起来做了什么？

options.en: Gave her a makeover with new clothes and contacts
options.zh: 给她换了新衣服、戴了隐形眼镜，做了大改造
给她买了一个结婚蛋糕

explain.en: Thea gave Patience an extreme makeover: contacts to show her emerald green eyes, bright new clothes, and she threw out the gray dresses.
explain.zh: 蒂娜给帕兴斯来了一次彻底大改造：戴隐形眼镜露出祖母绿色的眼睛，换上鲜艳的新衣，还把灰色连衣裙全扔了。
